channel.title: SMS on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in SMS on Tech Tracker

item.title: TxtNet - Now browse web over SMS without mobile / wifi data etc.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-8Fx9UJSE5IE/Y5tfOo_jKOI/AAAAAAAAPws/VAQ5G7MEioc9STrL8iXngX1gHooIo3ohQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1671126836675161-0.png" alt=""> Electronic devices are now widely used around the world out of them most people use and note them as favourite are PCs aka personal computers and smartphones isn’t it? as they not just have powerful and advanced modern hardware but also able to install and run digital softwares created using number of programming languages like C, C++, Python etc on processor then show up on monitor screen display with them you can execute almost all real life tasks electronically and digitally.

item.title: SMS Organiser - Best Messages App From Microsoft For Android
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-gnV57AbJlmU/X2Bg_UNVGrI/AAAAAAAABn8/NgDC4xNqWXUb8jABY9iB0yksAB9iu_ZMQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1600151802488115-0.png" alt="">  SMS Organizer Most android devices provide basic messaging app that showcase all the messages without categorising them even the google messaging app is clean & good still it lacks many features, so microsoft developed a sms app based on garage project and released in playstore. this, app have all the basic features but categorise all the messages into relevant category so it will be easy to navigate and access the messages.
